title: StupidCraft
description: Just a fun texture pack designed for fun modification of minecraft models and textures
body:
![StupidCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cd6d607da56517f7cf073e4b35a956fef81b790.png)
# **[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) & [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) or [OPTIFINE](https://optifine.net/downloads) REQUIRED**
**Welcome to StupidCraft**, my _first_ Minecraft resource pack, where **chaos** and **comedy** collide! This pack is designed to give Minecraft a hilarious makeover by replacing sounds, music, and models with iconic memes and goofy elements. Imagine hearing meme-worthy sound effects every time you mine, fight, or explore, and seeing the most ridiculous models in the most unexpected places.

![Slinerd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6559bd4874af45585f46135ae05b26e7cdda86f0_0.webp)



From funny tunes playing in the background to mobs and items that look downright absurd, StupidCraft promises a unique and entertaining experience. Whether you’re here for a laugh or just want to spice up your Minecraft world, this pack is sure to keep you smiling.

<summary>Whats new?</summary>

<details>
<summary>Records</summary>

- Blocks - "За ВДВ"
- Creator - "Yung fly on a truck" (PVZ)
- creator_music_box - "watery graves" (PVZ)
- precipice - "watery graves Full" (PVZ)

</details>

- nether sounds

- fall

<details>
<summary>WARNING</summary>

## **It is not recommended to play with this pack for more than an hour straight... unless you want to lose your mind XD**

<details>
<summary>note</summary>

****Note:** If Minecraft warns you that the resource pack is for a newer version or older, just ignore it**
